betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Separator§f:
The Separator (nuclearcraft:separator) is a single-block machine that separates materials into their constituent elements. It is essential for ore processing and material recovery.

§6Slot Layout (SeparatorRecipes.java:10)§f:
1 item input → 0 fluid input → 2 item outputs → 0 fluid output. The Separator takes one stack and produces two separate streams.

§6Crafting Recipe (CraftingRecipeHandler.java:70)§f:
Pattern "PMP / RCR / PMP" in a 3×3 grid. Letters: P = plateBasic, M = motor, R = dustRedstone, C = chassis. Yields 1 Separator.

§6What It Does (SeparatorRecipes.java:18-44)§f:
The Separator handles four families of material separation:
- §bUranium separation§f: 10× uranium (any form: plain, Carbide, Oxide, Nitride, ZA) → 9× U-238 + 1× U-235
- §bBoron separation§f: 12× boron → 9× B-11 + 3× B-10
- §bLithium separation§f: 10× lithium → 9× Li-7 + 1× Li-6
- §bMixed fuel separation§f: 9× LE/HE{Fuel}{fissile}{type} → 8/6× fertile + 1/3× fissile

§6Fission Fuel Coverage (SeparatorRecipes.java:30-32)§f:
addFuelSeparationRecipes() covers U, Np, Pu, Am, Cm, Bk, Cf fuel families. For each fissile isotope of each element, three parallel recipes are added (plain, Oxide, Nitride).

§6Fission Alloy Production (SeparatorRecipes.java:34-39)§f:
addFissionAlloyRecipes() generates ZA and Carbide forms for every fission element. The Separator can also serve as a small alloy furnace for {element} + dustZirconium → {element}ZA and {element} + dustGraphite → {element}Carbide.

§6Direct Descendants of Separator (TaskRetrieval)§f:
The graph shows 3 items in the Separator recipe:
- motor (nuclearcraft:part:8) — base motor
- dustRedstone (minecraft)
- chassis (nuclearcraft:part:10) — Machine Chassis

§6Why It Matters§f:
The Separator is the entry point to nuclear fuel production. Without it, you cannot enrich Uranium into U-235, Boron into B-10/B-11, or Lithium into Li-6/Li-7. These isotopes are the gating materials for advanced QMD and Trinity content.

§6Prerequisites§f:
Requires q30021 (Alloy Furnace) — the basic NC unlock.

§eTip§f: Build at least 2 Separators with speed upgrades. The U-235 enrichment cycle is throughput-limited, and one Separator cannot keep up with even a small reactor's fuel demand.

§eTip§f: Combine the Separator with the Ingot Former to produce pre-alloyed fuel forms (Carbide, Oxide, Nitride, ZA) for the Solid Fission Reactor.

§cWarning§f: The Separator outputs are radioactive. Don't carry stacks of U-235, B-10, or Li-6 in your inventory without proper PPE.
